class.name: DoodleMe
class.description: AI-assisted robot design tool. Describe your 3D printed mechanical and electronics assembly in natural language — DoodleMe generates OpenSCAD, URDF, BOM, wiring diagrams, and KiCad schematics with live RViz2 preview and Gazebo simulation support.

qtgui.label: DoodleMe
qtgui.statustip: AI-assisted robot design with Claude LLM
